title: Add strong-submission eval pipeline and ablation tooling
author: RogueTex

data.scope: export passthrough control with fp16 keep for tok_emb.weight by default

novel_contributions: Adds configurable final evaluation modes: standard, sliding, and TTT
Adds a sliding-window evaluation path with compiled forward_logits
Adds decoupled Muon weight decay via MUON_WEIGHT_DECAY
Adds export passthrough control INT8_ALWAYS_KEEP_FLOAT_NAME_PATTERNS, keeping tok_emb.weight in fp16 by default
Adds experiment runbook and scripts for ablation and top-3 runs under experiments/parameter_golf/
